traceability_rows.trace_rule: approved pattern subject hash is the direct upstream layout boundary
traceability_rows.test_obligation: candidate-check with P3-SPEC-PATTERNS review decision passes

traceability_rows.trace_rule: layout may reference only canonical element ids or approved gap decisions
approved messages must have layout placement and information access path
traceability_rows.test_obligation: missing or unknown message placement is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: layout pattern refs resolve to approved pattern registry
desktop, tablet, mobile, iOS, and Material constraints are explicit and preserve information access
parent, child, order, arrangement, sizing, scroll, width, entry, and return refs compose into one tree
traceability_rows.test_obligation: flat or contradictory containment is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: height uses access paths; width uses wrap, stack, density, or declared horizontal scroll exception
traceability_rows.test_obligation: height loss and undeclared horizontal overflow are rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: ordered layers, blocking behavior, Material elevation, background context, and focus restoration are explicit
traceability_rows.test_obligation: duplicate, unordered, non-blocking modal, or missing Material intent is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: metadata is non-authoritative and cannot write, render, or introduce refs absent from layout authority
traceability_rows.test_obligation: Figma write authority or drift refs are rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: schema-optional refs become mandatory in P3 when they bind mandatory pattern, state placement, z-axis, and Figma metadata artifacts
traceability_rows.test_obligation: missing pattern_refs, state_variants, z_axis_refs, figma_metadata_ref, or composition z_axis_refs is rejected

traceability_rows.trace_rule: compiler consumes layout refs and cannot invent layout package refs
